remember: Students will be able to recall the various financial statements and their components.
Students will be able to identify the different types of ratios and their uses.
Students will be able to list the steps involved in the analysis of financial statements.
understand: Students will be able to understand the significance of financial statement analysis.
Students will be able to explain the role of financial statement analysis in decision-making.
Students will be able to describe the importance of liquidity, profitability, and efficiency ratios.
apply: Students will be able to calculate different types of ratios from financial statements.
Students will be able to evaluate the financial performance of a company using ratio analysis.
Students will be able to make decisions based on the analysis of financial statements.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the trends and patterns in financial statements.
Students will be able to identify the strengths and weaknesses of a company from its financial statements.
Students will be able to compare the financial performance of two or more companies.

ncert_objectives: Explain the significance of financial statement analysis.
Describe the steps involved in the analysis of financial statements.
Explain the different types of ratios and their uses in decision-making.
board_exam_objectives: To analyze the financial performance of a company using ratio analysis.
To evaluate the strengths and weaknesses of a company from its financial statements.
To make decisions based on the analysis of financial statements.
